timeline.body: {"type":"error","error":{"type":"rate_limit_error","message":"Extra usage is required for long context requests."},"request_id":"req_011CYNj7TmYSikEg9SLgfNhr"}

provenance.notes: Verbatim 429 response body from a report of a persistent plan restriction. The fixture records Lash's policy that an otherwise unknown 429 remains retryable by default; the source does not demonstrate transient throttling.
